textByHash.0fc8865d9e7e29fd52fe99d03eb121c166672a2a: I'm Sigurd the Great and Brainy.
textByHash.3a4cb0368c6160fd20e2cd845d42db2f34ad318b: Because I invented the Log Canoe!
textByHash.19f7991a73599fce22ed03e3f229d3c54b85c07a: Yeash! Me and my cousins were having a great party by the river when we decided to have a game of 'Smack The Tree'
textByHash.c0c9c0b627cef874818e70f3d59a3f55a9dc80fc: It's a game were you take it in turnsh shmacking a tree. First one to uproot the tree winsh!
textByHash.81ff6bc838c87d66586374993ddb05cefe37b85f: Anyway, I won the game with a flying tackle. The tree came loose and down the river bank I went, still holding the tree.
textByHash.fe8fffb67fedd4fab819d411e2a170a1624ffd30: I woke up a few hours later and found myself several miles down river. And thatsh how I invented the log canoe!
textByHash.1576c60cdbef201b26928fed7a7aacec9e772997: Well I refined the design from the original you know!
textByHash.654abbbaa9c0d006ad4ceeeeb779d581f82343f8: I cut all the branches off to make it more comfortable. I could tell you how to if you like?
textByHash.609b3e6c2fc63bf73112e705f29d0feaea49fce6: Well, you don't look like you have the skill to make a canoe.
textByHash.e9b4e1da7653632b543c5e0539037feea6a9ec08: You need to have at least level 12 woodcutting.
textByHash.f446cc1d49593fc57624e4f73e640237c5b1b255: Once you are able to make a canoe it makes travel along the river much quicker!
textByHash.3afaa4f5c8fff0f5ce4bd70f32908a046af36047: It's really quite simple. Just walk down to that tree on the bank and chop it down.
textByHash.8661f0cf87ce42bbf18fe0c7736222444c282c69: Then take your axe to it and shape it how you like!
textByHash.3eb8905ae0646ef065b495a3cf07bb1960b04b32: You can make a log canoe like mine! It'll get you 1 stop down the river.
textByHash.61642158bb60b05c0cf6f132c3583091bcf099a3: There's some snooty fella down near the Champions Guild who reckons his canoes are better than mine. He's never said it to my face though.
textByHash.e4847b6e031751af839e18380556d4bf08387fa7: You could make a Dugout canoe with your woodcutting skill, but I don't see why you would want to.
textByHash.f0c73091cfa6c8727bab530b44c2d17295b6e516: Well, you're pretty handy with an axe!
textByHash.e349bb5bdbeab54d96654f0e28bc330543317263: You could make Stable Dugout canoes, like that snooty fella Tarquin.
textByHash.01fc8c43943358c478450ac72b12d4f2dcd0568e: He reckons his canoes are better than mine. He's never said it to my face though.
textByHash.d27065e18e0ca61d49f8674cc0073d48a739be63: You look like you know your way around a tree, you can make a Waka canoe.
textByHash.bfe16b5e46dc8330e4b26a9f90fcc2e66ff601da: I've only ever seen Hari using them. People say he's found a way to canoe the river underground and into the Wilderness
textByHash.d7dacc29af55111c95dabbc1bdcec3d4ebc17a96: Hari hangs around up near Edgeville
